paper_scope: Finite computational predictivity gates for a target-free G2 four-plane flavor model; the E6 neutral-fermion calculation is retained only as an external benchmark appendix and is not presented as a consequence of the G2 model.

claims.claim: The four-plane configuration space is Gr(3,7)^4 with a residual SU(3) stabilizer after fixing h=e7.
claims.scope: Model definition, not a Standard Model derivation.

claims.claim: A 21-feature projector/G2-tensor basis is numerically independent on the locked Haar sample, and 74 coefficient choices were fixed before flavor evaluation.
claims.scope: Finite sampled basis and coefficient ensemble; not the full invariant ring.

claims.claim: At the strict reliability cut, 68 retained branches are stable and 29 are isolated modulo residual symmetry.
claims.scope: Best of four generic starts per action; no global completeness certificate.

claims.claim: Among 6 isolated full-rank post-stability spectra, none has two adjacent decade-scale gaps in both sectors.
claims.scope: Applies only to the declared signed-associator map and 74-action ensemble.

claims.claim: Without a shared left-generation link, a CKM/PMNS-like matrix is not invariant under the independent left-frame O(3) gauges.
claims.status: analytic obstruction plus numerical gauge check
claims.scope: The mass singular values remain gauge invariant.

claims.claim: Within the three inequivalent oriented four-cycle pseudoscalars, the stated exchange/CP characters select one primitive loop and one minimal exchange-even three-channel product.
claims.status: analytic finite-class selection with numerical tensor checks
claims.scope: Uniqueness is only within the declared scalar complex-loop class.

claims.claim: The primitive and three-channel loop actions are stable at their retained stationary representatives but have 7 and 6 extra physical zero modes, respectively.
claims.scope: Each used 96 generic starts; common numerical energies do not prove global minimality.

claims.claim: Integrating out the auxiliary unitary link in -Re Tr(Sigma^dagger K) gives -||K||_*.
claims.scope: The standardized unit coefficient used in the action is a modeling convention, not a symmetry-derived coupling.

claims.claim: Of 21 angle-evaluable retained backreacted branches, 16 have smooth classical Hessians; all 16 are quotient-stable, 2 are isolated, and none satisfies all three NuFIT 6.0 three-sigma angle intervals.
claims.scope: Post-exposure exploratory angle test; the CP phase was not scored, and five rank-deficient rows are N/A for a classical Hessian.

claims.claim: The closest retained angle diagnostic has L1 residual 22.622022 degrees and is stable but non-isolated.
claims.scope: Not a prediction and not evidence for a full PMNS match.

claims.claim: The supplied 'Quaternionic Kernel Theorem' narrative does not provide a precise theorem, proof, locked action, or reproducible derivation of its quoted CKM/PMNS numbers.
claims.scope: Its numerical assertions are not used as results in the manuscript.

claims.claim: In the external two-family E6 benchmark, nu^c and the extra singlet s are distinct heavy states; the reproduced physical masses are [149556000000.0, 152852000000.0] and [6679200000000000.0, 6826400000000000.0] GeV at point 1, with corresponding point-2 masses [1584239999999.9998, 4046160000000.0] and [3960599999999999.5, 1.01154e+16] GeV.
claims.scope: Two-family fit; exact electroweak active-sterile mixing and a third family are not reconstructed.

claims.claim: The local 26 -> 16+10+1 branching claim is dimensionally inconsistent; the valid 16+10+1 decomposition belongs to the E6 27 under SO(10)xU(1).
claims.scope: The E6 benchmark cannot be attributed to an F4 26 construction.
